evals.expected_output: Full risk assessment with score 0-100, all 6 checks listed with pass/fail, recommendation to PROCEED, WARN, or BLOCK, and simulation result
assertions: Risk score is shown as a number between 0 and 100
At least 4 individual checks are listed with their findings
Recommendation is one of: PROCEED, WARN AND CONFIRM, or BLOCK
Simulation result is shown (success or revert reason)
Function selector 0x38ed1739 is identified (swapExactTokensForTokens or similar)

evals.prompt: Check this transaction before I approve: I want to call approve on USDC (0xE0BE08c77f415F577A1B3A9aD7a1Df1479564ec8) for the maximum uint256 amount. The spender is 0xDeaDbeefdEAdbeefdEadbEEFdeadbeEFdEaDbeeF. Calldata: 0x095ea7b3000000000000000000000000deadbeefdEAdbeefdEadbEEFdeadbeEFdEaDbeeF ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
evals.expected_output: BLOCK or HIGH/CRITICAL rating due to unlimited approval. Clear warning about permanent access. Advice to use exact amount instead.
assertions: Unlimited approval flag is detected and reported
Risk score is >= 40 (at minimum, from the unlimited approval alone)
Spender address is shown in the report
User is advised to approve only the exact amount needed
Recommendation is WARN AND CONFIRM or BLOCK

evals.prompt: Is this contract safe to interact with? 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001 — I want to deposit 100 USDC there.
evals.expected_output: Contract check shows this is a precompile (very short bytecode), score reflects risk, verification check runs
assertions: Contract existence check is performed with cast code
Risk level reflects the unusual nature of a precompile address
Report is shown to user before any deposit action

evals.prompt: Before I execute this transferOwnership call on my contract upgrade, please run the guardrail. Target: 0x838800b758277CC111B2d48Ab01e5E164f8E9471, calldata: 0xf2fde38b000000000000000000000000abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12
evals.expected_output: HIGH or CRITICAL risk — selector 0xf2fde38b is transferOwnership. Score >= 35 from selector alone. Clear warning about ownership transfer.
assertions: Warning explicitly mentions this is an ownership transfer
New owner address is extracted and shown from calldata
